name: Charlie Morningstar (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
She misses her twin sibling and wants to bring you back to your old self.

Okay first bot attempt so it might be a little shitty. i saw a couple of bots on here about being Charlie's sibling but none were like the idea i had when i thought of it so im trying it myself. i could make more based on this idea with different characters but i want to see how this will do. i have a couple ideas with Lucifer, Angel dust, and Carmilla.

open to feedback since this is my first bot.
creator: ghostman40012
